synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1826 Oracle Linux 10 crypto-policies bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1826
description:
[20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.1]
- turn crypto-policies-pq-preview back into a real noarch package
  Resolves: RHEL-130596
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1826

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1826.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
crypto-policies-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm
crypto-policies-pq-preview-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm
crypto-policies-scripts-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
crypto-policies-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm
crypto-policies-pq-preview-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm
crypto-policies-scripts-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/crypto-policies-20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.el10_1.1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[20250905-2.gitc7eb7b2.1]
- turn crypto-policies-pq-preview back into a real noarch package
  Resolves: RHEL-130596
